inline_comments.message:
With the ones under platform, I had to set tox-dir to the subproject subdirectory for the generation of code coverage data.

I had to set sonar-mvn-goal to "-f [subprojectdirectory] sonar:sonar" so it would use the suproject pom.xml file

I don't think docker-root was used for sonar.

This change conflicts with https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/ci-management/+/102525/ where this jjb is removed/refactored

Possibly we can remove update to dcaegen2-services-pm-subscription-handler.yaml on this change and Fiachra can add sonarcloud setting on new job/template.
